concept: Overthinking: the sequel no one asked for
title: Funny Overthinking Shirt - Sarcastic Burnout Tee for Millennials and Gen X
description:
Let everyone know the mental chaos lurking beneath your calm exterior. This witty design captures the universal struggle of overthinking every little thing, turning it into a cheeky badge of honor. Perfect for the over-analyzers, the second-guessers, and the midnight worriers among us. Embrace your inner spiral with humor and style!

Perfect for:
- Anyone whose brain won't shut up at 2 a.m.
- People who overthink lunch orders, emails, and everything else.
- Relatable adults navigating work stress, social anxiety, and midlife chaos.

DETAILS:
- Available in a full range of colors to fit your mood and wardrobe.
- Bold typography design that grabs attention while staying clean and versatile.
- Made-to-order, guaranteeing a crisp, high-quality print every time.

100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton (Bella Canvas 3001) — lightweight 4.2 oz/yd² (142 g/m²) for breathability
Retail crew neckline with ribbed knit collar and shoulder tape for shape retention
Side seams and tear-away label for fit stability and comfort
Vibrant, crisp printing: DTF or DTG depending on provider for detailed sleeve/label prints
Ethically sourced/REACH certified; blank product sourced from Honduras; multiple fabric blends for heathered colors

Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
Non-chlorine: bleach as needed
Tumble dry: low heat
Iron, steam or dry: medium heat
Do not dryclean

Shipped by BanterWearCo. Questions? Message me — I respond faster than a teenager asked to take out the trash. (Low bar, admittedly.)
